description: Baseline: First Load JS = 156 KB (page=54.3 KB, shared=102 KB). Total JS raw=936.6 KB, gz=283.9 KB. CSS raw=32.8 KB, gz=6.6 KB.
Move optimizePackageImports under experimental (correct location for Next.js 15.5). No improvement — 157 KB (worse by 1 KB). Tree-shaking already works without it.
Lazy-load AboutModal via React.lazy. Splits ~5KB of text-heavy modal content into a separate chunk loaded on demand. First Load 156→155 KB, page chunk 54.3→53.1 KB, gz 13.1→11.8 KB.
Replace 4 floating emoji motion.divs with CSS-only animations. JS page chunk 53.1→53.0 KB, gz 11.8→11.7 KB. CSS +0.6KB but JS smaller. Simpler code.

Remove unused Shadcn UI components (card, progress), cn() utility, and deps (clsx, tailwind-merge, class-variance-authority, lucide-react). CSS gz 6.6→6.4 KB. JS unchanged (tree-shaking already excluded them). Simpler codebase.

Switch from motion to LazyMotion+m components with domAnimation features. Loads only animation features, not layout/drag/etc. First Load 155→144 KB (-11 KB, -7.1%). Page chunk 53→42.2 KB. Total JS gz 284→273.6 KB.
Lazy-load VictoryScreen and LevelCompleteScreen via React.lazy. Page chunk 42.2→41.8 KB. Splits rarely-shown screens into separate chunks loaded on demand. Simpler KeyboardEngine.
Reduce particle count 32→20. No bundle size impact — particle count is runtime data, not code size. Reverted.
Lazy-load ParticleExplosion via React.lazy. Page chunk 41.8→41.3 KB. Particles only loaded when first celebration triggers. App chunk gz 11.3→10.8 KB.
Compact spelling words into comma-separated strings split at runtime. Raw app chunk 40.5→38.8 KB. No gzip improvement (already compresses well). Cleaner representation.
Compact wrong-key phrases into single pipe-delimited string. Marginal raw savings (38.8→38.7 KB). Consistent format with spelling words.
Add reactStrictMode: false. No bundle size impact — strict mode only affects dev builds. Reverting.

Replace AnimatePresence message animations with CSS keyframes. Remove AnimatePresence import from KeyboardEngine. First Load 144→143 KB. Messages now use CSS animate-msg-in / animate-msg-wrong-in classes.
Remove experimental.optimizePackageImports (unnecessary with LazyMotion approach). Cleaner config, identical bundle. Page 41.3→41.2 KB.

Remove framer-motion from WelcomeScreen entirely. Replace all motion.div/button with CSS animations and CSS hover transitions. First Load 143→142 KB, page chunk 41.2→39.5 KB. WelcomeScreen is now zero-framer-motion.
Remove framer-motion from AudioToggle. Replace m.button with CSS hover/active transitions and CSS entrance animation. Page chunk 39.5→39.4 KB. AudioToggle is now zero-dependency.
Replace Home button m.button with CSS hover/active transitions and delayed fade-in. App chunk gz 10.7→10.6 KB. One fewer m.button in main playing view.
Compact keyboard layout using string-based row specs parsed at init. Raw app chunk 37.9→37.5 KB. Reported size unchanged (gzip already compressed the patterns). Cleaner representation.
Replace progress bar m.div with CSS transition-[width] and word display m.div with CSS animation. Only 1 m.div left in KeyboardEngine (target letter spring/shake). Raw chunk 37.5→37.4 KB.
Replace target letter m.div with CSS spring-like bounce + shake animations. Remove m import from KeyboardEngine — only LazyMotion+domAnimation remain (for StarshipKeyboard). Page 39.4→39.3 KB.

Remove framer-motion from StarshipKeyboard (SVG animateTransform) and KeyboardEngine entirely. Move LazyMotion into lazy-loaded components. framer-motion is now ZERO in initial bundle — fully deferred. First Load 142→114 KB (-28 KB, -20%). Page chunk 39.3→11.4 KB (-71%).

Remove framer-motion from ALL components. VictoryScreen, LevelCompleteScreen, ParticleExplosion, and AboutModal now use CSS animations exclusively. ZERO framer-motion in the entire app. Total JS gz 275.3→246.1 KB (-29.2 KB, -10.6%). Can now remove framer-motion dep.
Remove framer-motion from package.json entirely. Update test setup to remove framer-motion mock. App is now 100% CSS animations with zero animation library dependency. First Load 114 KB unchanged.
Verification run. First Load 114 KB stable. All 456 tests pass. Bundle at practical minimum — 102 KB shared is Next.js+React runtime floor.
Resume session — verification run. 114 KB stable.
